mapper.select:
select count(*) from ghp
GHP_USAGE = 'Y'
AND GHP_CATEGORY = #{ghpCategorySearch}
AND ( UPPER(GHP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_CATEGORY) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(GHP_STANDARD) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT G.GHP_ID AS ghpId, G.GHP_NAME AS ghpName, G.GHP_CATEGORY AS ghpCategory, G.GHP_STANDARD AS ghpStandard, G.GHP_CHECK_METHOD AS ghpCheckMethod, G.GHP_CYCLE AS ghpCycle, NVL(G.GHP_WH_TYPE, 0) AS ghpWhType, NVL(G.GHP_WP_TYPE, 0) AS ghpWpType, WH.WH_TYPE_NAME AS whTypeName, WP.WP_TYPE_NAME AS wpTypeName, G.GHP_MIN_VALUE AS ghpMinValue, G.GHP_MAX_VALUE AS ghpMaxValue, G.GHP_UNIT AS ghpUnit, G.GHP_USAGE AS ghpUsage FROM GHP G LEFT JOIN WP_TYPE WP ON G.GHP_WP_TYPE = WP.WP_TYPE_NO LEFT JOIN WH_TYPE WH ON G.GHP_WH_TYPE = WH.WH_TYPE_NO WHERE G.GHP_ID = #{ghpId}

select count(*) from GHP_LOG GL
LEFT JOIN EMP E ON GL.GLOG_WORKER = E.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON GL.GLOG_WHID = W.WH_ID
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE WP ON GL.GLOG_WPID = WP.WP_ID
WHERE GL.GLOG_GHP = #{ghpId} AND GL.GLOG_USAGE = 'Y'

select * from ( select rownum rn, I.* from ( SELECT GL.GLOG_ID AS glogId, GL.GLOG_GHP AS ghpId, GL.GLOG_DATE AS glogDate,
GL.GLOG_WORKER AS glogWorkerId, E.EMP_NAME AS glogWorkerName,
GL.GLOG_VALUE AS glogValue, GL.GLOG_RESULT AS glogResult, GL.GLOG_ACTION AS glogAction, GL.GLOG_MEMO AS glogMemo,
GL.GLOG_WHID AS glogWhId, W.WH_NAME AS glogWhName,
GL.GLOG_WPID AS glogWpId, WP.WP_NAME AS glogWpName,
GL.GLOG_USAGE AS glogUsage
FROM GHP_LOG GL
LEFT JOIN EMP E ON GL.GLOG_WORKER = E.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON GL.GLOG_WHID = W.WH_ID
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE WP ON GL.GLOG_WPID = WP.WP_ID
WHERE GL.GLOG_GHP = #{ghpId} AND GL.GLOG_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY GL.GLOG_DATE DESC, GL.GLOG_ID DESC ) I ) where rn between #{page.startRow} and #{page.endRow}

choose.when:
SELECT WP_TYPE_NO AS "code", WP_TYPE_NAME AS "name" FROM WP_TYPE WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( TO_CHAR(WP_TYPE_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR UPPER(WP_TYPE_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY WP_TYPE_NO
choose.otherwise:
SELECT WH_TYPE_NO AS "code", WH_TYPE_NAME AS "name" FROM WH_TYPE WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( TO_CHAR(WH_TYPE_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR UPPER(WH_TYPE_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY WH_TYPE_NO

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GHP ( GHP_ID, GHP_NAME, GHP_CATEGORY, GHP_STANDARD, GHP_CHECK_METHOD, GHP_CYCLE, GHP_WH_TYPE, GHP_WP_TYPE, GHP_MIN_VALUE, GHP_MAX_VALUE, GHP_UNIT, GHP_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'GHP' || GHP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ghpName}, #{ghpCategory}, #{ghpStandard}, #{ghpCheckMethod}, #{ghpCycle}, CASE WHEN #{ghpWhType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWhType} END, CASE WHEN #{ghpWpType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWpType} END, #{ghpMinValue}, #{ghpMaxValue}, #{ghpUnit}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE GHP SET GHP_NAME = #{ghpName}, GHP_CATEGORY = #{ghpCategory}, GHP_STANDARD = #{ghpStandard}, GHP_CHECK_METHOD = #{ghpCheckMethod}, GHP_CYCLE = #{ghpCycle}, GHP_WH_TYPE = CASE WHEN #{ghpWhType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWhType} END, GHP_WP_TYPE = CASE WHEN #{ghpWpType} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE #{ghpWpType} END, GHP_MIN_VALUE = #{ghpMinValue}, GHP_MAX_VALUE = #{ghpMaxValue}, GHP_UNIT = #{ghpUnit} WHERE GHP_ID = #{ghpId}
